query: DELETE FROM menu_addon_options WHERE name IN ('Azeite e limão', 'Vinagrete clássico', 'Molho de mostarda e mel') AND groupId IN (SELECT id FROM menu_addon_groups WHERE menuItemId IN (150024, 150025, 150026, 150027));
